title: Ant Control in Kensington, Brooklyn | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Trusted ant extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350 to $550. Same-day service available.
intro: Kensington residents facing ant infestations can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for fast, effective solutions. Our expert technicians understand the unique challenges of ant control in this diverse Brooklyn neighborhood, from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family homes. We offer comprehensive ant extermination services with pricing ranging from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kensington for years, earning the trust of homeowners and property managers throughout the neighborhood. Our licensed exterminators use safe, eco-friendly treatments that eliminate ant colonies at the source while protecting your family and pets.
localContext: Kensington's charming mix of Victorian homes, brick apartment buildings, and proximity to Prospect Park creates ideal conditions for various ant species seeking food and shelter. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and older building stock near Ocean Parkway and Church Avenue often experience seasonal ant activity that requires professional intervention.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Kensington, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Kensington range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the type of ant species involved. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Kensington homes commonly deal with pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in the neighborhood's older wooden structures, as they can cause structural damage over time if left untreated.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an ant problem in Kensington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Kensington residents. Our team understands that ant infestations can escalate quickly, especially during warmer months, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout Brooklyn.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians will provide specific instructions on any minimal precautions needed during and after treatment to ensure everyone's safety.
